test:frontend.error: Frontend tests have issues: (1) auth.test.ts fixed to use correct env var (NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL), (2) dashboard.test.tsx and onboarding.test.tsx have vi.mock() hoisting issues - these are test infrastructure bugs, not implementation bugs. Typecheck and lint both pass.

test:backend.note: 121 tests passed, 7 errors in test_admin_users.py due to fixture issue (no such table: users). This is a test fixture issue, not implementation bug.

blockingIssues.description: Pagination count bug: get_question_count() called without year filter returns wrong totals. Year counts identical for all years.
Practice/exam modes fetch list but URL id parameter is effectively ignored - all filtered PYQs load regardless of id.
Hardcoded mock subjects/topics instead of API calls. Bookmarks not persisted (local state only).
N+1 query problem: get_subject_stats_for_attempts and get_topic_stats_for_attempts use nested loops with individual DB queries (500+ queries for 10 attempts x 50 questions).
Division by zero: platform_percentage = platform_avg / attempt.test_series.total_questions * 100 can divide by zero if total_questions is 0.
Date filtering bug: trend calculation ignores user's date filter when start_date is None, causing incorrect results.
_update_streak() modifies streak freezes and current_streak in memory but never calls update_streak_record() to persist. Streak breaks and freeze usage are not saved.
_generate_daily_tasks() creates duplicate tasks for weak topics - same topics scheduled for both revision AND lesson on same day.
Backend endpoints completely missing. Frontend calls /admin/subjects, /admin/topics, /admin/lessons, /admin/questions, /admin/test-series but these are not implemented in router.py.

appliedUpdates.description: test:backend command documented to require DATABASE_URL environment variable set to 'sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:' for test runs

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add enforcement for max file size (200-300 lines) specified in Clean Code section. Multiple content milestone files exceed this: exam/page.tsx (620 lines), practice/page.tsx (468 lines).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pyq-library review found 620 and 468 line files vs 200-300 line guideline

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD requirement - workers claim followedProcedure=true but no tests are created. Add verification step to check test files exist before marking feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pyq-library, performance-analytics, personalized-study-plans all have no tests added despite skill requiring TDD

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add N+1 query prevention to code review checklist. Repository methods should use JOINs or batch queries, not nested loops with individual queries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: performance-analytics has N+1 issues in 4 repository methods affecting 500+ queries per analytics call

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add division-by-zero and null-safety checks to code review checklist. All calculations dividing values from database should have guards.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: performance-analytics service.py:264 divides by total_questions which could be 0

rejectedObservations.observation: MinIO healthcheck port mismatch in services.yaml
rejectedObservations.reason: The minio service in services.yaml correctly uses port 3102 for healthcheck. The review observation about port mismatch was incorrect - services.yaml is consistent.
